name: Iredell-Statesville Schools
searchAliases: Iredell County North Carolina school calendar
districtFact: Iredell-Statesville Schools publishes traditional calendar PDFs and separate alternate calendars for Early College and N.B. Mills Elementary.

about.title: About Iredell-Statesville Schools
about.content: Iredell-Statesville Schools serves students in Iredell County, North Carolina, including Statesville and surrounding communities in the Charlotte-Concord-Gastonia region. Families use the I-SS calendar to track first and last student days, teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, professional development early release days, progress reports, report cards, quarter endings, winter break, and spring break.

about.title: Which I-SS Calendar Should You Use?
about.content: Most students follow the traditional Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar. Early College and N.B. Mills Elementary have separate calendars, so families in those programs should use the alternate calendar links published by the district.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for I-SS Families
content: Confirm whether your student follows the traditional, Early College, or N.B. Mills Elementary calendar.
Add professional development early release days to family calendars because dismissal changes affect transportation and childcare.
Treat teacher workdays and annual leave dates as no-school days for students unless the district announces a make-up change.
Check the official I-SS calendar page for revised PDFs and school-specific updates.

compareIntro: Compare the Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar with other North Carolina district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

customSections.label: Related I-SS Calendar Years
customSections.content: Use these related Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar years and nearby North Carolina district calendars for school-year planning. A 2027-2028 I-SS calendar link should be added after a verified source is available.

districtFaqs.q: Which Iredell-Statesville calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Iredell-Statesville Schools traditional calendar PDFs for the listed school years.
Yes. I-SS publishes separate Early College calendars and N.B. Mills Elementary calendars in addition to the traditional calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Are I-SS teacher workdays student holidays?
districtFaqs.a: For family planning, teacher workdays and required teacher workdays are student no-school days unless the district announces a calendar change.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify I-SS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Iredell-Statesville Schools calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with I-SS.
